title: 396Hz Sitar, Flute, Tabla for Late Night Anxiety Reset | Darbari Kanada
hook_angle: Late-night emotional acceptance and letting go
hook_phrase: You don't need to be okay right now. Just be here.
music_prompt:
Instruments: Sitar, Bansuri Flute, and Tabla. Raga: Darbari Kanada. BPM: 45 BPM.
Each note must decay with a long, natural reverb. Ensure wide silence between musical phrases, emphasizing the contemplative nature of the raga. There should be no buildup, no climax, maintaining a consistent, deeply meditative texture throughout. Record with a warm, analog quality. The structure must be loop-friendly and seamless.
Sitar will lead with a weighty and introspective alap, exploring the deep komal rishab and komal gandhar notes with heavy meend (glides). The bansuri flute will answer the sitar's phrases with its own delicate, midnight-infused expressions. Tabla will enter softly and subtly at approximately 3 minutes, playing a very slow and gentle dadra taal.
The playing feel should evoke majestic stillness, allowing thoughts to settle like sediment, creating a profound late-night depth.
Explicitly exclude: No Western instruments. No aggressive percussion fills. No sudden dynamic shifts or abrupt changes in intensity.
image_prompt:
Madhubani folk painting style from Mithila, Bihar, India. 16:9 widescreen format. Flat 2D perspective with bold hand-drawn black outlines. Hand-painted texture on aged parchment or natural fabric. Vibrant natural pigments: deep red, saffron yellow, peacock teal, forest green, ivory white, turmeric gold. Characteristic nature motifs: peacocks, lotus flowers, mango leaves, fish, deer, birds. Intricate geometric and floral borders with elephants and paisley.
Scene: A serene night garden where three musicians are seated under a large, flowering tree - a sitar player, a bansuri flute player, and a tabla player. A full moon glows softly overhead, depicted as a stylized mandala. Peacocks and deer are shown listening attentively in the shadows of the garden foliage. Several small oil lamps (diyas) are arranged in a gentle semicircle around the musicians. The overall palette should be dominated by deep indigo for the night sky, contrasted with rich golds and silvers for the moon, stars, and lamp glow. The stylized sky is filled with delicate stars.
No text or letters anywhere. Pure illustration only. No watermarks.
thumbnail_tagline: Saturday Night Deep Relaxation for the Soul
description:
You don't need to be okay right now. Just be here.

Welcome to DhunDetox, your dedicated sanctuary for mental wellness through the timeless beauty of Indian classical music. This unique composition features the profound Raga Darbari Kanada, an ancient melody beautifully rendered with the soulful Sitar, the ethereal Bansuri Flute, and the grounding Tabla. Tuned precisely to a calming 396Hz frequency, known for its ability to release fear and guilt, this video is thoughtfully designed for urban professionals aged 25-40. It offers a much-needed reset for late-night anxiety, guiding you towards profound relaxation and inner peace after a demanding day. Let the intricate yet soothing ancient melodies gently wash over you, recentering your spirit and bringing a quietude to your restless mind.

Use this deeply resonant music for:
*   Deep meditation & mindfulness practice
*   Calm and restorative sleep
*   Gentle yoga & stretching sessions
*   Focused study & concentrated work
*   Effective anxiety & stress relief
*   Evening reflection & introspection
*   Unwinding after a long and busy day
*   Promoting mental clarity and emotional balance
*   Creating a peaceful ambient atmosphere
*   Cultivating overall well-being

Raga Darbari Kanada, with its majestic, contemplative, and late-night gravity, is renowned for its ability to instill a sense of profound calm and introspection. Its deep, resonant notes are perfect for quieting a restless mind, offering solace and an anchor in moments of emotional turmoil, making it ideal for a late-night anxiety reset.

यह भारतीय शास्त्रीय संगीत वीडियो रात की चिंता और तनाव से मुक्ति के लिए बनाया गया है। सितार, बांसुरी और तबला के मधुर स्वर, राग दरबारी कानाड़ा में, आपके मन को शांति और सुकून देंगे। 396Hz की आवृत्ति आपको गहरी नींद और मानसिक शांति प्रदान करेगी।
